Poison Storm  

Description

1: Decrease Hitpoints by 60.

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 125 Skill: Evocation
Casting Time: 3.5 Recast Time: 12
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Poison
Range: 150 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any AE Duration: 7500
AE Range: 20 Fizzle Adj: 25
Deletable: Yes Reflectable: Yes
Focusable: Yes Dispellable: Yes
Interruptable: Yes Timer: 5
Target Type: Targeted AE Spell Type: Detrimental
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: Your skin blisters as poison rains down on you.
Cast on other: Soandso 's skin blisters.

Game Description

Conjures a rain of poison over your target, causing 60 damage every 3 seconds to creatures in the area. The rain will dissipate after damaging %T creatures or after %i seconds.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Poison Storm

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Poison Storm
ClassLevel
SHM22
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (19)
  • Sold By (10)
  • Screenshots
Add Image

Merchants:

  • Hatem - 2pp 3gp 9cp

Cabilis East

  • Eyan Rehius - 2pp 3gp 9cp

Everfrost Peaks
  • Starn Bearjumper - 2pp 3gp 9cp

Innothule Swamp
  • Stragak - 4pp 5gp 7sp 4cp

Shar Vahl
  • Dar Khura Ahmih - 3pp 6gp 4sp 6cp

Shar Vahl, Divided (NoS)
  • Dar Khura Ahmih - NoS - 2pp 3gp 9cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Mystic Abomin - 2pp 3gp 9cp

The Rathe Mountains
  • Scribe Garp - 2pp 3gp 9cp
Post Comment
clarification.
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2012 at 1:38 PM Rating: Decent
MeMymy
53 posts
And for a little more clarification on how this spell works. It is capped at 4 hits of damage total. I have no idea where that whole '3 waves of dmg to all mobs' is coming from and why it still says that.

If you have one mob it will hit it every tick for 4 ticks for 60dmg each time (or adjusted for what ever resists may be). If you have 2 mobs it will hit each twice (for a total of 4 hits, or 2 on each). If you have 3 mobs they will each be hit once for the first round and then a tick later only 1 will be hit giving you a total of 4 hits. With 4 or more mobs there will be only 1 hit when you cast the spell and it will only be on your target and 3 others, no waves, no "all mobs"

Edited, Aug 16th 2012 3:39pm by MeMymy
▲ Page top
only 4
QuoteReply

53 posts

For many years I was told that shamans spells were max of 4. I wasn't sure until i started pling another shaman.. i mean in truth my first shaman never ever used this junk.

However, i dont care how perfectly they are stacked. i dont care how many i pull, no matter what, it never hits more then 4 + me period, ever.

Lame..

# Nov 01 2003 at 5:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251926549
View User Forum
51 posts
I'm guessing this is a 'rain' type spell. These spells are AE and have few ticks. They are'nt considered DoTs because if a creature moves out of the AEs radius then it doesn't take damage from subequent ticks.
▲ Page top
poision damage
QuoteReply
# Mar 02 2003 at 11:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256800945
11 posts
This spell will do 60 points of damage per tick for three ticks unless resisted. if your only getting 40 points of dmg i would guess that you skill is low.
▲ Page top
RE: poision damage
QuoteReply
# Oct 30 2005 at 7:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591801678987
344 posts
Skill has nothing to do with how much damage the spell does. Skill effects fizzle rate. The level of you and the mob, as well as the target's resistances, determine whether the spell hits for its full damage or is resisted entirely.
▲ Page top
Correction
QuoteReply
# Dec 28 2002 at 6:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779618084
5 posts
This spell is capable of doing 180 hp damage and should be considered DoT that doesn't last long. It does 60 points per tick for three ticks.

this is true if attacking only one mob, if 2 or 3 present will do 60 on each.

#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 29 2002 at 10:53 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) And BTW if you are so smart why didn't you try and get them to update the spell info?

RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2004 at 4:38 AM Rating: Decent
Kyrros
Sage
164 posts
To answer your question...

No, this spell does not divide its damage among all it targets.

All targets within its radius (whether friend or foe) will recieve the full 60 points of poison damage (minus resists).

But...

This spell has a worse damage per mana ratio on a single target than Tainted Breath (Shaman's lowest ratio DoT) but if a second MoB (or more) is present to take the damage, it jumps to a damage/mana ratio that is higher than Envenomed Breath (@lvl 24)

Therefore...

The key to this spell is making sure you're using it on crowd of MoBs... if you're soloing singles, or your group is single pulling MoBs, don't bother with spell unless the MoB has to be dead now... and I mean now... as this spell isn't very mana efficient on single MoBs.

Hope this helped...
____________________________
Kyrros <Knights Of Insomnia> - Bristlebane
Guild Leader and Guild Historian
Human Veteran Ranger and Warder of Tunare for 70 80 85 90 seasons
Knights of Insomnia Homepage - Hosted by Guildportal.com

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 28 2002 at 12:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) The damage done by this spell is 40 hit points times 3. I have tested it enough times to know for a fact. I believe it crosses the line between DD and DoT spells in that it is a DoT but doesn't last very long at all. You could say it does 40hp direct damage and then 40 per tick for two ticks. Either way 60 is just plain wrong as is 180 (I'm not gonna say where I've seen that figure).
RE: Poison Damage
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2004 at 4:45 AM Rating: Decent
Kyrros
Sage
164 posts
No, if you watch the damage messages, you can clearly see that this spell is actually three waves of a maximum of 60 points damage for each wave that is checked against the target's Poison Resist.

If you're seeing numbers less than that, it is due to partial resists, as the resist is checked three times, once at the open of each wave - with each wave being 1 tick (or 6 seconds) apart.

Edited, Fri Apr 16 05:55:37 2004
____________________________
